spec.name: Parallel Auto-Mode für Spec- und Backlog-Kanban

tasks.title: Schema- und Reader-Vorarbeit
tasks.description: Backlog-Schema um 'blocked'-Status erweitern, BacklogJsonItem TS-Union erweitern, mapJsonStatusToFrontend ergänzen. Audit: alle backlog-index.json-Writes auf withKanbanLock(backlogPath, ...) umstellen. resumeContext-Feld in Schema einführen.
tasks.planSection: Phase 1: Schema- und Reader-Vorarbeit (PAM-001, PAM-002, PAM-003)

tasks.title: Reader-Helper (getReadyStories, getReadyBacklogItems, activeIncidents)
tasks.description: SpecsReader.getReadyStories(projectPath, specId, excludeIds) für V1+V2. BacklogReader.getReadyBacklogItems(projectPath, excludeIds) inkl. ready/pending/open. activeIncidents[]-Lese-/Schreib-Layer mit V1+V2 Branches und One-shot-Migration aus lastIncident.
tasks.planSection: Phase 1: Schema- und Reader-Vorarbeit (PAM-001, PAM-002, PAM-003)

tasks.title: KanbanFileWatcher Set-of-IDs API
tasks.description: API erweitern: watch(specPath, filename: 'kanban.json'|'backlog-index.json', ids: Set<string>), addId(id), removeId(id). Directory-Watching beibehalten (macOS-Reliabilität). Events tragen storyId-Payload.
tasks.planSection: Phase 1: Schema- und Reader-Vorarbeit (PAM-001, PAM-002, PAM-003)

tasks.title: Slot + Base-Orchestrator + Backlog-PTY-Migration
tasks.description: auto-mode-cloud-session.ts → auto-mode-story-slot.ts (Rename + Slim). auto-mode-orchestrator-base.ts mit Map<id, slot>, Gate, serialisiertem scheduleTick. AutoModeSpec/BacklogOrchestrator. project-concurrency-gate.ts (Semaphor). Backlog-Execution: runClaudeCommand → CloudTerminalManager.createSession (PTY). Per-ID-Dedup processedTransitions. Promise.allSettled in cancelXAutoMode. git worktree prune beim Konstruktor. maxConcurrent=1 initial (Verhalten unverändert).

tasks.title: Worktree-per-Story Helper
tasks.description: createStoryWorktree, removeStoryWorktree, mergeStoryBranchIntoSpec, setupBacklogSymlink in workflow-executor.ts. Spec: ${proj}-worktrees/${feature}-${storyId}, Branch feature/${feature}/${storyId}. Backlog: ${proj}-worktrees/backlog-${slug}, Branch feature/${slug}. Symlink-Pfad-Unit-Tests mit realpath. Konflikt-Pfad: kein git reset, Sub-Worktree behalten, Story blocked, Incident mit Pfad.

tasks.title: Backlog-Backend-Scheduling + Frontend-Timer-Entfernung
tasks.description: WebSocket-Handler-Umbau: handleBacklogStoryStart → handleBacklogAutoModeStart, neuer backlog.auto-mode.cancel-Handler. _scheduleNextBacklogAutoExecution + _processBacklogAutoExecution aus dashboard-view.ts entfernen. Frontend schickt nur noch start/cancel, Backend übernimmt Scheduling.

tasks.title: Echte Parallelität freischalten (maxConcurrent=2)
tasks.description: ProjectConcurrencyGate Default = 2 global pro Projekt. Hard-Cap 4. Tick-Scheduling füllt freie Slots aus dem Ready-Set. Hard-Requirement: Spec gitStrategy=worktree für Parallelmodus, sonst clamp auf maxConcurrent=1 mit UI-Banner.

tasks.title: Frontend Multi-Slot + Queued-State
tasks.description: AutoModeProgressBoard State + WS-Demux nach scope und storyId. _specAutoModeBoard: Map<specId, AutoModeProgressBoard>. _backlogAutoModeBoard: AutoModeProgressBoard | null. Multi-Slot-Pills (running + waiting) in Spec- und Backlog-Boards. Multi-Incident-Modal mit Liste, einzeln dismissibar. AutoModeProgress mit slotState='running'|'waiting'.

tasks.title: Code Review + Spec-Conformance
tasks.description: Code-Quality + Spec-Conformance Review v1.1 (Opus) — Plan-Validation der Verbindungs-Matrix automatisch ausgeführt.

tasks.title: Integration Validation
tasks.description: End-to-End-Tests gemäß spec.md Integration Requirements: Spec-Parallel, Backlog-Parallel, Failure-Tolerance, Cancel mid-flight, gitStrategy=branch Fallback, Multi-Spec/Spec+Backlog. Wallclock-Halbierung verifizieren.

tasks.title: Finalize PR
tasks.description: User-Todos sammeln, Branch pushen, PR erstellen mit vollständigem Summary, CHANGELOG-Entry für Multi-Incident-Migration und --session-id-Verlust, manuelles Aufräumen-Hinweis für stranded Worktree-Dirs.

changeLog.details: Lean kanban initialized with 11 tasks via MCP tool

Model changed from null to opus
Model changed from null to sonnet
Model set to sonnet for: PAM-001, PAM-003, PAM-002, PAM-004, PAM-005, PAM-006, PAM-007, PAM-008, PAM-997, PAM-998, PAM-999
Model changed from sonnet to opus
Model changed from sonnet to opus
Git branch setup via UI: feature/parallel-auto-mode
Unblocked: all dependencies done/in_review (PAM-001, PAM-002, PAM-003)
